chunks.title: Gathering and Invocation
chunks.reason: Describes the assembly of Israel for fasting and confession, followed by the Levites' call to bless God.

chunks.title: God's Creation and Covenant with Abraham
chunks.reason: A prayer recounting God as Creator and His specific covenant actions with Abraham.

chunks.title: History of Israel's Rebellion and Deliverance
chunks.reason: A detailed historical review of Israel's cycles of disobedience and God's faithful deliverance in the wilderness and conquest.

chunks.title: Confession of Current Hardship
chunks.reason: The people acknowledge God's righteousness while confessing their current state of slavery and distress.

chunks.title: Sealing the Agreement
chunks.reason: Concludes the chapter with the action of sealing a written covenant document.
